title: Copper Tools Expanded
description: Adds copper tools that oxidize through four stages, with attributes that shift as they weather!
body:
![Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc1e876a49799d6cd25af552cb0f2f1098398545.png)

**A mod aiming to expand and improve copper by adding tools, equipment and more items with unique properties and uses!**

### Copper Utility
Apart from the **tools, weapons and armor** added by the mod we also have additional utility.

- **Barometer:** Can be used to view current weather, predict next weather, and see when weather will change.

- **Copper Shields:** Used like normal shields, but has different speed penalties.

- **Copper Apples:** Like a Golden Apple it will give you effects when eaten, but copper is toxic so you get a mix of positive and negative effects.

### Oxidation
Copper tools start oxidizing when exposed to water. Either when in water blocks or while standing in rain. Oxidation has 4 stages, and each stage gets different tool values (Like damage, durability, swing speed, etc) and properties!

![Shielding - Showcasing Oxidation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/971c339ac78736ec3777c51dadaf9e843a19085a.gif)

### Waxing
Copper tools can be waxed to lock the oxidation stage in place. This will make the tool keep its oxidation stage until manually unwaxed.

![All sets of tools and armor in the game!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5c380e4bdcb129b9b1384c7847a280cb908c561c.gif)

### Planned updates?
- **Near future:** 
  + 1.21.4 - 1.21.11 ports
- **Future:**
  + Fabric 1.21.1 - 1.21.11 ports
  + Continued updates for 26.1+

1.17.1 - 1.19.4 will for the most part remain unchanged. I won't keep up parity but might add smaller features and bugfixes
